ref_text_raw: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.

text: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced U.S. troops would be leaving Syria.
